standard_variable.semantic_intent: admission baseline body mass index snapshot
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target
standard_variable.anchor_family: hospital admission start inherited from std_weight_admission_baseline

source_code_labels.std_weight_admission_baseline: approved hospital-admission baseline weight in kg
source_code_labels.std_height: approved subject-level standardized height in cm

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier and height join key
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier and target retained key
identifier_normalization.selected_stay_id_role: ICU-stay provenance identifier inherited from the selected upstream admission-baseline weight event

database_mapping.source_grain: one retained upstream admission-baseline weight row per hadm_id plus one retained upstream height row per subject_id
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained row per hospital admission encounter with both approved baseline weight and approved height

summary_build_translation.anchor_family: hospital admission start inherited from std_weight_admission_baseline
summary_build_translation.window_start_translation: inherit the selected baseline weight window from std_weight_admission_baseline
summary_build_translation.window_end_translation: inherit the selected baseline weight window from std_weight_admission_baseline
summary_build_translation.qualifying_row_translation: start from retained std_weight_admission_baseline rows and keep only rows with a matching retained std_height row on subject_id
summary_build_translation.selection_translation: no BMI-specific event selection; selected weight row is inherited from std_weight_admission_baseline
summary_build_translation.aggregation_translation: compute std_bmi_kg_per_m2 = std_weight_kg_baseline / ((std_height_cm / 100.0) ^ 2), rounded to 2 decimals
summary_build_translation.tie_break_translation: weight tie-breaks are inherited from std_weight_admission_baseline; height tie-breaks are inherited from std_height
summary_build_translation.no_source_row_translation: hospital admissions without retained baseline weight or retained height are absent from the BMI output
summary_build_translation.partial_window_translation: partial window behavior is inherited from std_weight_admission_baseline

representation_and_normalization.source_unit_expectation: upstream weight is kg and upstream height is cm before conversion to meters in the formula

validation_contract.no_source_row_policy_check: target admissions without approved upstream baseline weight or approved height are intentionally absent from the retained output; missing height is audited rather than represented as null BMI
notes: The retained target grain is hospital admission encounter, not ICU stay.
BMI is derived only from approved retained upstream standard assets.
Outlier-flagged rows are retained and must not be silently dropped in this governed asset.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint reads this mapping spec and delegates to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_bmi_admission_baseline outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
